openPositions.title: Software Engineer - Backend
openPositions.description: Join our backend team to build scalable and high-performance APIs and microservices for our mobile applications using Node.js and NestJS framework.
requirements: Strong proficiency in Node.js and TypeScript
Knowledge of RESTful API design and GraphQL
responsibilities: Develop and maintain RESTful APIs and GraphQL endpoints
Build scalable microservices using NestJS framework
Design and optimize database schemas and queries
Write comprehensive unit and integration tests
Collaborate with mobile and frontend teams
Participate in code reviews and architectural decisions

openPositions.title: DevOps Engineer
openPositions.description: Help us build and maintain robust CI/CD pipelines and cloud infrastructure for our mobile and web applications.
requirements: Experience with AWS, Google Cloud, or Azure
Knowledge of Docker, Kubernetes, and containerization
Experience with CI/CD tools (GitHub Actions, Jenkins)
responsibilities: Collaborate with development teams on infrastructure needs
